productDisplayName: Puma Men's Complete Itana Silver Black Blue Shoe
description: Get used to maximum comfort and performance during runs with these Complete Itana shoes from puma. Equipped with patented M2D Technology for added stability, these shoes work as hard as you to help you run longer and stronger.UpperSandwich mesh material for a high degree of breathability, lowering risk of blistering Reflective elements for secure running in low light conditions Synthetic overlays in formstripe and cat logo design for secure Fit and style Lace-ups for snug fit Cushioned collar and tongue for plush comfortMidsoleIdCELL, a low-density cushioning unit, employed to improve shock absorption and protect the feet KMS Lite midsole for enhanced cushioning and lightweight comfortOutsoleArchTec technology to guide the foot through a natural transition from touch-down to toe-off Decoupled heel construction that distrbutes the impact allowing for a softer motion duoCELL, a long-lasting CELL unit in the heel, for improved shock absorption EverRide, a blown rubber outsole reduces weight and improves forefoot cushioning EverTrack, a long-lasting composite used in the outsole to provide durability in high-wear areas M2D, a second density on the medial side to stabilize the foot during the stance phase
